code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws_byte(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn is_ws_at(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    is_ws_byte(b)
  when None
    true
  end
end

fn skip_ws(_ s: String, _ start: Int, _ n: Int) -> Int
  mut i = start
  while i < n and is_ws_at(s, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  i
end

fn token_end(_ s: String, _ start: Int, _ n: Int) -> Int
  mut i = start
  while i < n and not is_ws_at(s, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  i
end

fn count_token(_ s: String, _ tok: String, _ n: Int) -> Int
  mut count = 0
  mut p = 0
  while p < n
    p = skip_ws(s, p, n)
    if p < n
      let q = token_end(s, p, n)
      if string.substring(s, p, q) == tok
        count = count + 1
      end
      p = q
    end
  end
  count
end

fn is_first_occurrence(_ s: String, _ tok: String, _ start: Int, _ n: Int) -> Bool
  mut p = 0
  mut found = false
  while p < start and not found
    p = skip_ws(s, p, n)
    if p < start
      let q = token_end(s, p, n)
      if string.substring(s, p, q) == tok
        found = true
      end
      p = q
    end
  end
  not found
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let s = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut best_token = ""
  mut best_count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    i = skip_ws(s, i, n)
    if i < n
      let j = token_end(s, i, n)
      let tok = string.substring(s, i, j)
      if is_first_occurrence(s, tok, i, n)
        let c = count_token(s, tok, n)
        if c > best_count
          best_count = c
          best_token = tok
        end
      end
      i = j
    end
  end
  println("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
end
